summary: The given text does not provide any data linking high intelligence to a distinct subtype of schizophrenia; thus, no support exists for this proposed classification within current clinical understanding. Clinically, there is insufficient evidence that intelligence level defines an identifiable subgroup among schizophrenic patients.
